ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gui_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GUI component */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Class name of the component */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "use_example" TEXT /* Example of how to use the component */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or special instructions for using the component */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the component */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who last updated the component */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the component is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes or new features in this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentLicenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., MIT, GPL) */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Full text of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL to the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentRepos" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository link */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "repo_link" TEXT /* Link to the code repository */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., GitHub, GitLab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentTags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentDependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "depends_on_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component it depends on */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentFeatures" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature or property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentContributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who contributed */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentDownloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component has been downloaded */,
  "last_download_date" TEXT /* Date of the last download */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentRatings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comments by the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentUsageExamples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage example */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "code_snippet" TEXT /* Code snippet demonstrating how to use the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the example */,
  "example_type" TEXT /* Type of example (e.g., code snippet, tutorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentIssues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or workaround for the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentDiscussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion post */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "posted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who posted the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The comment or discussion post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded discussions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "componentDocumentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation link */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GUI component */,
  "doc_link" TEXT /* Link to the documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the documentation */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., user manual, API reference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., junior developer, senior developer, team lead) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the developer's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)
